# Cooperator Spain Localisation

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This addon implements Spanish localization for Cooperator Module

Features:

- Add Tax identification on subscription request
- Add Tax identification on subscription request website form

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Known issues / Roadmap

Move this feature to cooperator module
\- Change property_cooperator_account to not accept deprecated account

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/cooperator/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/cooperator/issues/new?body=module:%20l10n_es_cooperator%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
